architecture.note: SAM v1 has no memory/propagation. Every frame is an independent detect+segment; there is no object id and no temporal consistency. Contrast with the SAM 2 pipeline, which detects once and propagates.

identity.note: top-1 box is re-chosen every frame by detector confidence; no memory links it to the previous frame. Large consecutive-frame centroid jumps with the target still present = the top-1 hopping between instances.
identity.hop_definition: consecutive-frame top-1 centroid jump > 10% of image diagonal

outputs.note: video is gitignored (large); sample frames in outputs/images/
